# Dependencies — Line 1h: Other earned income

**Tax year:** 2025
**Form:** 1040 / 1040-SR line 1h
**Concept:** catch-all wages slot for earned-income items that belong on the wages section of Form 1040 but do not fit lines 1a–1g

Line 1h aggregates four mutually-non-overlapping categories — strike/lockout benefits, excess elective deferrals, disability pension wages (below plan minimum retirement age), and current-year corrective distributions. Each category is excess-tested independently; the PSO premium exclusion (up to $3,000 per person) reduces the disability component when both eligibility and election are affirmative. No separate IRS form is filed; the line 1h amount carries a write-in statement of category labels.

---

## Outputs Produced

| Output | JSON path | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `otherEarnedIncome` | `form1040.income.otherEarnedIncome` | BigDecimal line 1h total; null when all source categories null |
| `otherEarnedIncomeStatements` | `form1040.income.otherEarnedIncomeStatements` | `List<String>` of category labels for the inline write-in / attached statement |

Set in `buildIncome()` → `Income.setOtherEarnedIncome()` + `Income.setOtherEarnedIncomeStatements()` at lines 7470-7475.

---

## Top-Level Formula

```
line1hRaw = addNonNull(addNonNull(addNonNull(disabilityTotal, excessDeferrals), correctiveTotal), strikeTotal)
line1h    = roundMoney(line1hRaw)   (whole-dollar HALF_UP)
```

`addNonNull` semantics: `null + null = null`; `null + X = X`; `X + Y = X+Y`.

---

## Computed Inputs (Four Categories)

| Category | Source | Backend variable | Companion label |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cat 1 — Strike/lockout benefits | Manual entry + 1099-MISC box 3 with `box3IsStrikeBenefits = true` | `strikeTotal` | "Strike/lockout benefits" |
| Cat 2 — Excess elective deferrals (pre-tax §402(g) / SIMPLE / §457(b)) | W-2 box 12 codes D, E, F, S, G | `excessDeferrals` | "Excess elective deferrals" |
| Cat 3 — Disability pension wages (below plan minimum retirement age) | 1099-R box 2a (preferred), box 1 fallback; code 3 | `disabilityTotal` | "Disability pension wages" (or `(PSO)` suffix) |
| Cat 4 — Current-year corrective distributions | 1099-R box 2a; code 8; non-IRA only | `correctiveTotal` | "Corrective distributions (current year)" |

---

## Excluded Items

| Item | Route to (not line 1h) |
|---|---|
| Scholarship / fellowship grants not on W-2 | Schedule 1 line 8r |
| IRA distributions | Form 1040 lines 4a / 4b (`iraSepSimple` gate) |
| Disability AT or AFTER plan minimum retirement age | Form 1040 lines 5a / 5b |
| Other pension/annuity 1099-R | Lines 5a / 5b |
| Inmate wages | Schedule 1 line 8u |
| NQDC (W-2 box 11) | Schedule 1 line 8t |
| Prior-year corrective distributions (1099-R code P) | Prior-year amended return |
| Designated Roth excess (W-2 box 12 codes AA, BB, EE) | Already in W-2 box 1 (avoids double count) |

**Combined codes 3+8 on the same 1099-R**: Cat 3 wins (disability) via `!codes.contains("3")` guard in Cat 4 — prevents double-counting.

**Line 1h is INCLUDED in line 1z** (companion to line 1i which is EXCLUDED).

---

## Constants (2025) — `ReferenceData.java`

| Constant | Value | Statutory basis |
|---|---|---|
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_402G_LIMIT` | $23,500 | IRC §402(g)(1); Notice 2024-80 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_402G_CATCHUP` | $7,500 | IRC §414(v); age ≥ 50 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_402G_ENHANCED_CATCHUP` | $11,250 | SECURE 2.0 §603; ages 60–63 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_LIMIT` | $16,500 | IRC §408(p)(2)(E) |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_CATCHUP` | $3,500 | IRC §414(v); age ≥ 50 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_ENHANCED_CATCHUP` | $5,250 | SECURE 2.0 §603 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_457B_LIMIT` | $23,500 | IRC §457(e)(15) |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_457B_CATCHUP` | $7,500 | IRC §414(v) |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_457B_ENHANCED_CATCHUP` | $11,250 | SECURE 2.0 §603 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_117_LIMIT` | $17,600 | SECURE 2.0 §117 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_117_CATCHUP` | $3,850 | SECURE 2.0 §117 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_117_ENHANCED_CATCHUP` | $5,775 | SECURE 2.0 §117 |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_457B_3YEAR_SPECIAL_CATCHUP_LIMIT` | $47,000 | IRC §457(b)(3); 2 × regular limit |
| `ELECTIVE_DEFERRAL_403B_15YEAR_RULE_BONUS` | $3,000 | IRC §402(g)(7) |
| `PSO_PREMIUM_EXCLUSION_CAP` | $3,000 | IRC §402(l); NOT annually-indexed |

W-2 box 12 code maps (`TaxReturnComputeService.java:121-124`):
```
DEFERRAL_402G_CODES   = Set.of("D", "E", "F")
DEFERRAL_SIMPLE_CODES = Set.of("S")
DEFERRAL_457B_CODES   = Set.of("G")
```
Roth codes AA, BB, EE intentionally excluded (already in box 1).

---

## Input Statement Sources

### W-2 — for excess elective deferrals (Cat 2)

| Field | Use |
|---|---|
| `employeeSSN` | SSN attribution to taxpayer or spouse |
| `box12Entries[].code` | D/E/F → 402(g) pool; S → SIMPLE pool; G → 457(b) pool |
| `box12Entries[].box12Amount` | Amount deferred to each plan |

### 1099-R — for disability (Cat 3) and corrective (Cat 4)

| Field | Use |
|---|---|
| `entryId` | Cross-reference for personal-form selection entries |
| `distributionCodes` | Code 3 → disability; Code 8 → current-year corrective; Code P → prior-year (excluded) |
| `taxableAmountAmount` (box 2a) | PREFERRED amount source |
| `grossDistributionAmount` (box 1) | Fallback for Cat 3 only (Cat 4 does NOT fall back — issuers must populate box 2a) |
| `iraSepSimple` | When true, Cat 4 outer guard excludes the entry |
| `recipientTIN` | Auto-match to taxpayer/spouse SSN; falls back to manual owner |

### 1099-MISC — for imported strike benefits (Cat 1)

| Field | Use |
|---|---|
| `box3IsStrikeBenefits` | Boolean gate; only entries where true contribute |
| `otherIncomeAmount` | Strike benefit amount |

---

## Input Personal Form

| Form ID | Firestore path | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `other-earned-income` | `users/{uid}/other-earned-income` | No | If absent: strike + owner/age selections empty; excess deferrals still computed from W-2 |

### Fields in `other-earned-income`

#### `strikeBenefits` section

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `manualStrikeBenefitsAmount` | number | User-entered strike not on statements |

#### `disabilityPensions.entries[]`

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `source1099RId` | string | Yes (per entry) | Reference to specific 1099-R |
| `owner` | string | Conditional | `"taxpayer"` / `"spouse"` — required when recipientTIN matches neither SSN |
| `isBelowPlanMinimumRetirementAge` | boolean | Yes (per entry) | Must be answered; blocking flag otherwise |

#### `electiveDeferrals.taxpayer` / `electiveDeferrals.spouse` (SECURE 2.0 §117 etc. — added 2026-06-01)

Per-person sub-objects. Spouse sub-object skipped on MFS. UI renders only when person has SIMPLE box S.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `usesSimple117ElevatedLimits` | boolean | Elevated $17,600 / $3,850 / $5,775 SIMPLE limits |
| `uses457b3YearSpecialCatchup` | boolean | 457(b) pool cap → $47,000; SUPPRESSES age-50 / enhanced catch-up for that pool (IRC §457(b)(3)) |
| `uses403b15YearRule` | boolean | Extra $3,000 on 402(g) pool; STACKS with age-50 catch-up (IRC §402(g)(7)) |

#### `disabilityPensions.psoExclusionTaxpayer` / `psoExclusionSpouse` (added 2026-06-01)

Per-person sub-objects. Spouse skipped on MFS. UI renders only when person has at least one disability entry.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `isEligibleRetiredPublicSafetyOfficer` | boolean | Eligibility check |
| `electsPsoPremiumExclusion` | boolean | Affirmative election |
| `totalQualifyingPsoPremiumsPaid` | number | Premium amount; capped at $3,000 in compute via `subtractNonNegative` |

#### `correctiveDistributions.entries[]`

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `source1099RId` | string | Yes (per entry) | Reference to specific 1099-R |
| `owner` | string | Conditional | Required when recipientTIN matches neither SSN |

---

## Output to Forms

Line 1h has NO attached IRS form (unlike line 1c → Form 4137 or line 1g → Form 8919).

| Output | Where |
|---|---|
| `form1040.income.otherEarnedIncome` | Form 1040 line 1h amount cell |
| `form1040.income.otherEarnedIncomeStatements` | Inline write-in (joined with `"; "`) or `"Refer to attached sheet"` + appended statement page (UI Rule 44) |

---

## Per-Person Excess Deferral Computation (Cat 2)

```
For each person p:
  totals = computeDeferralTotalsForSsn(w2Entries, p.ssn)   (total402g, totalSimple, total457b)
  catchupEligible = age >= 50
  enhancedCatchup = 60 <= age <= 63                         (INCLUSIVE both ends — SECURE 2.0 §603)

  base402g  = uses403b15YearRule ? $23,500 + $3,000 : $23,500
  baseSimple = usesSimple117 ? $17,600 : $16,500
  base457b   = $23,500

  if catchupEligible AND NOT uses457b3YearSpecialCatchup:
    limit457b += enhancedCatchup ? $11,250 : $7,500
  if uses457b3YearSpecialCatchup:
    limit457b = $47,000   (SUPPRESSES age-50 catch-up — IRC §457(b)(3))
  if catchupEligible:
    limit402g  += enhancedCatchup ? $11,250 : $7,500
    limitSimple += usesSimple117
                   ? (enhancedCatchup ? $5,775 : $3,850)
                   : (enhancedCatchup ? $5,250 : $3,500)

  excess402g  = max(0, total402g  − limit402g)
  excessSimple = max(0, totalSimple − limitSimple)
  excess457b   = max(0, total457b   − limit457b)
  perPersonExcess = addNonNull(addNonNull(excess402g, excessSimple), excess457b)

excessDeferrals = addNonNull(taxpayerExcess, spouseExcess)
```

Each plan-type pool is excess-tested INDEPENDENTLY; the §402(g) limit does not pool with SIMPLE or §457(b).

---

## Per-1099-R Disability Computation (Cat 3)

```
For each 1099-R rEntry with codes.contains("3"):
  owner = resolveOwnerFromRecipientSsn(recipientTIN, taxpayerSsn, spouseSsn)
  if owner == null:
    owner = normalize(selection.owner)
    if empty → missingDisabilityOwner = true
  belowMinAge = selection.isBelowPlanMinimumRetirementAge
  if belowMinAge == null → missingDisabilityAge = true
  if belowMinAge == true:
    amount = parseAmount(rEntry.taxableAmountAmount) ?? parseAmount(rEntry.grossDistributionAmount)
    disabilityTotal = addNonNull(disabilityTotal, amount)
  else (belowMinAge == false):
    amount NOT added → routes to lines 5a/5b
```

**PSO double-gate (IRC §402(l))**:
- Requires BOTH `isEligibleRetiredPublicSafetyOfficer == true` AND `electsPsoPremiumExclusion == true`
- `computeLine1hPsoExclusion` enforces $3,000 cap via `min(totalPremiums, $3,000)` and clamps disability via `subtractNonNegative` (never goes negative)
- Statement label switches to `"Disability pension wages (PSO)"`
- Spouse PSO skipped on MFS

---

## Per-1099-R Corrective Computation (Cat 4)

```
hasCurrentCorrective = codes.contains("8")
hasPriorCorrective    = codes.contains("P")
iraSepSimple = (rEntry.iraSepSimple == true)
if (hasCurrentCorrective || hasPriorCorrective) AND !iraSepSimple AND !codes.contains("3"):
  if hasCurrentCorrective:
    if owner == null:
      owner = normalize(selection.owner)
      if empty → missingCorrectiveOwner = true
    correctiveTotal = addNonNull(correctiveTotal, parseAmount(rEntry.taxableAmountAmount))
  // Code P only: iterated; NO amount added (prior-year correction)
```

**Cat 3 vs Cat 4 asymmetry (deliberate)**: Cat 3 falls back to box 1 (gross) when box 2a is null; Cat 4 does NOT fall back. Lock-in test `computesLine1hCorrectiveDistribution_box2aEmpty_excludedNoFallback`.

---

## Mutual Exclusion Rules (Enforced)

| Rule | Implementation |
|---|---|
| Disability + corrective on same 1099-R | `!codes.contains("3")` guard in Cat 4 — disability wins |
| Roth (AA/BB/EE) excluded from Cat 2 | Code sets list D, E, F / S / G only |
| IRA/SEP/SIMPLE corrective excluded from Cat 4 | `!iraSepSimple` guard |
| Prior-year corrective (code P) excluded from Cat 4 | Code P iterated, amount not added |
| Post-min-retirement-age disability | `belowMinAge == false` → null on line 1h; routes to 5a/5b |
| Statutory employee (W-2 box 13) | Not in Cat 1–4 (Schedule C path) |

---

## MFS Attribution (Three-Point Gate)

On MFS, `computeOtherEarnedIncome(..., isMfsReturn=true, ...)`:
- nulls `spouseSsn` and `spouseAge`
- adds explicit `continue` at top of 1099-R loop when `recipientTIN == spouseSsnRaw`
- skips `psoExclusionSpouse` sub-object
- skips `electiveDeferrals.spouse` sub-object

Three-point gate per Code Validation #1 (2026-05-10).

---

## Validation Flags

| Flag | Trigger | Blocking |
|---|---|---|
| `LINE1H_DISABILITY_OWNER_REQUIRED` | Per code-3 1099-R: `recipientTIN` matches neither SSN AND no manual owner | YES |
| `LINE1H_DISABILITY_MIN_RETIREMENT_AGE_REQUIRED` | Per code-3 1099-R: `isBelowPlanMinimumRetirementAge` unanswered | YES |
| `LINE1H_CORRECTIVE_OWNER_REQUIRED` | Per code-8 (non-IRA, non-disability) 1099-R: TIN mismatch + no manual owner | YES |

Non-flag defensive behaviors (silent):
- `otherEarnedIncomeData == null` → no contribution
- 1099-R with empty `distributionCodes` → continue
- Combined codes `"3,8"` → Cat 3 only
- Code P only → no amount added; no flag
- `iraSepSimple == true` (any code) → Cat 4 outer guard fails
- W-2 Roth codes (AA/BB/EE) → ignored by Cat 2 code sets
- Person without SSN → `computeDeferralTotalsForSsn` returns `(null,null,null)`
- Person without DOB → `ageAtYearEnd = null` → no catch-up (may overstate excess)

---

## Compute Order

| Step | Operation |
|---|---|
| 1 | Load `other-earned-income`, `you`, `spouse`, `filing-status` |
| 2 | Load W-2, 1099-R, 1099-MISC statements |
| 3 | `computeOtherEarnedIncome` at line 425 → emits `OtherEarnedIncomeComputation(line1h, statements)` |
| 4 | `buildIncome()` aggregates `line1h` into `line1z` via `addNonNull` at line 7361 |
| 5 | `setOtherEarnedIncome(line1h)` + `setOtherEarnedIncomeStatements(statements)` at lines 7470-7475 |
| 6 | `line9 = addNonNull(line1z, line2b, ...)` at line 7440 |
| 7 | Downstream: EIC line 27a, Schedule 8812 line 18a, Form 2441 earned income via `line1z` |

No computed upstream result is required — only personal forms and raw statements.

---

## Key Invariants

- Line 1h is the sum of FOUR mutually-exclusive categories (strike + excess deferrals + disability below min age + current-year corrective non-IRA)
- 457(b)(3) 3-year final catch-up SUPPRESSES the age-50 / enhanced catch-up for that pool (avoids double-counting the IRC §457(b)(3) doubling)
- PSO premium exclusion is double-gated (eligibility AND election) and capped at $3,000 per person via statutory `PSO_PREMIUM_EXCLUSION_CAP`
- Cat 4 box 2a does NOT fall back to box 1 (issuers MUST populate box 2a for code-8 corrective)
- Combined codes 3+8 on the same 1099-R: disability (Cat 3) wins; corrective excluded
- Line 1h does NOT trigger FICA / SE tax (no Schedule 2 / SE link)
- Line 1h does NOT feed Form 8959 line 3 (categories are not Medicare wages — unlike line 1c / 1g)
- Line 1h CANNOT be negative under current logic (excess forced ≥ 0; box 2a/1 issuer-set; strike non-negative)
- Line 1h IS included in line 1z (companion line 1i is excluded)
- Statement labels are emitted only when amount `!= null && != 0`

---

## Downstream Consumers

- Line 1h → line 1z → line 9 → AGI → line 11b → line 15
- Line 1h → EIC earned income (IRC §32) via line 1z
- Line 1h → Schedule 8812 ACTC base (line 18a) via line 1z
- Line 1h → Form 2441 earned income (IRC §21) via line 1z

---

## Out of Scope

- Roth excess elective deferral detection when total pre-tax + Roth combined exceeds §402(g) (current code undercounts in this rare case)
- Contributory amount in 1099-R box 5 (employee contribution recovery) — code uses box 2a as-is; issuer responsible
- 1099-MISC box 3 sub-classification beyond strike — IRS provides no sub-code
- IRS-required separate §402(g) reporting for excess corrected after April 15
